metadata.title: Restaurant POS | Adon ERP
metadata.description: Adon ERP Restaurant POS connects your tables, orders, kitchen, payments, inventory, and accounting in one seamless workflow.

hero.description: Adon ERP Restaurant POS connects your tables, orders, kitchen, payments, inventory, and accounting in one seamless workflow.

serviceSection.title: One
serviceSection.subtitle: for seamless service
serviceSection.description: From floor orders to kitchen preparation and payment collection, every restaurant workflow stays connected.

selfOrderingSection.title: Self ordering is the
selfOrderingSection.subtitle: future
selfOrderingSection.description: Let guests order from QR menus, kiosks, or tablets. Orders go straight to the kitchen and sync with your table management.

floorPlanSection.title: Custom
floorPlanSection.description: Design your dining room, manage table availability, move guests between areas, and follow every order from seat to kitchen.

orderPreparationSection.title: Seamless
orderPreparationSection.subtitle: preparation
orderPreparationSection.description: Send items to the right kitchen station, track preparation status, and serve faster during busy hours.

compatibleDevice.title: Compatible with any device
compatibleDevice.description: Run your restaurant POS on tablets, phones, laptops, or touch screens.

offlinePayments.title: Offline payments
offlinePayments.description: Keep taking orders and payments even when your connection drops.

integratedPayments.title: Integrated payments
integratedPayments.description: Accept cards, cash, mobile wallet, and online payments from one screen.

splitBills.title: Split bills & tips
splitBills.description: Split orders, collect tips, and manage shared tables with ease.

kitchenPrinting.title: Kitchen printing
kitchenPrinting.description: Send food items directly to the kitchen with status tracking.

customerLoyalty.title: Customer loyalty
customerLoyalty.description: Reward repeat guests with points, coupons, and personalized offers.

appsSection.title: One
appsSection.description: Expand your restaurant workflow across the Adon ERP ecosystem.

ctaSection.title: Join modern restaurants
ctaSection.description: Restaurant teams use Adon POS to serve faster, reduce errors, and keep every order connected from table to accounting.

getStartedSection.title: Unleash
getStartedSection.subtitle: your growth potential
getStartedSection.description: Build a connected restaurant operation with POS, kitchen display, table management, payments, inventory, and accounting.
